meaning: adj.象珠一样的,饰有珠子的,有泡的
examples: The chairman keeps a beady eye on things.
I shall certainly keep a beady eye on his behaviour.
With bright beady eyes, they glanced shyly at each other, sniggering a little, sniffing and applying coat-sleeves a good deal.
"Johan Zoffany RA: Society Observed" at the RA argues for a revaluation of this accomplished, beady-eyed and witty painter.
And iRobot's beady laser eyes and limited animation make it look friendly -- a trait its makers fully intended.
